(r 76(E),—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (d) of Sub-section (21 of Section 52 of the I Jnlawful Aai vines f Prevention) Act. 1967 (37 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namch '— 1 Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules maybe called the Procedure for Admission and Disposal of \pplnation Rules. 2004. (2) They shall come into force on the dale of their publication m the Official Gazette. 2. Making and admission of application: 11) An application under Sub-section (1) of Section 36 shall be addressed to the Secretary to the Government of ludi.i n\ lite Ministry of Home Affairs. North Block, New Delhi and presented personally or forwarded io him by registered ,)()>! wiili acknowledgement due. (2) The application shall set forth concisely the grounds for removal of the organization. v Disposal of application:— i \) The application made under Sub-section (1) of Section 36 of the Act shall be considered and disposed of by the I Vntr;ii Government within a period of forty-five days from the date of receipt of application. (?-) 1 ft he Central Government is satisfied that the application filed under Sub-section (1) of Section 3d is delect i\ •; in anv ku in, the Central Government shall, before rejecting such application, call upon the concerned organization or lhe pewit, as the case may be, to remove the defect within a period of thirty days and if he or it does so. the application shall Iv considered.
